channel.title: Insomni'hack 2024 on pwnlentoni
channel.description: Recent content in Insomni'hack 2024 on pwnlentoni

item.title: Insomni'hack Teaser 2024 — Vaulty
item.description: Exploiting a format string vulnerability to leak the canary and libc, then ROP to shell via a buffer overflow in a password manager binary.
